example.title: Internal Analytics Dashboard Redesign
example.problem: Product teams lacked immediate access to user activation cohorts, leading to gut-feel roadmap additions and slow iteration.
example.businessContext: TechInnovate's user analytics data reporting was bottlenecked, suffering from query latencies up to 5 days, severely slowing down feature release validations.
research: Mapped user cohort data access workflows
painPoints: High SQL query complexity blocks non-technical team members
No unified dashboard for release metrics
requirements: Interactive filters for user activation milestones
userStories: As a PM, I want to filter user cohorts by sign-up date so that I can validate release dropoffs.
As a designer, I want to view funnel dropoffs visually so that I can identify friction areas.
example.prioritization: Used RICE framework to prioritize interactive filtering and SQL builder over automated exports.
example.solution: Designed a high-fidelity Next.js analytics cockpit directly consuming denormalized query tables, bringing cohort telemetry sync down to real time.
example.implementation: Leveraged React Hook Form and Recharts widgets for dynamic filtering. Collaborated with 2 backend developers to build specialized reporting views.
challenges: Parsing unstructured historical click data into defined cohort models.
Mitigating initial dashboard query lag for massive user segments.

decisions.title: Denormalizing Data Views
decisions.description: Creating flat reporting database tables rather than complex joins.
decisions.tradeoff: Increases storage costs slightly but eliminates query lag.

example.tradeoffs: Sacrificed real-time exports feature in MVP to prioritize latency optimization.
example.businessImpact: Re-architected reporting dashboards to support daily product iterations. Average decision latency reduced from 5 days to 2 hours.
metrics: Dashboard adopted by 100% of product leadership in 3 weeks
timeline: Month 1: User Discovery & SQL Schema Spec
lessonsLearned: Involving backend engineers early in database denormalization schemas prevents API blockers.
Telemetry definitions must be aligned across business units before sprint planning starts.
futureImprovements: Supporting automated Slack alerts for funnel drops
